quick_start.intro: 先跑首次使用向导，确认推荐模型，然后用一条命令把本机模型跑起来。

steps.title: 运行首次使用向导
steps.body: 用 onboarding 检查硬件、扫描资源并生成推荐。

steps.title: 确认推荐模型
steps.body: 查看推荐列表，优先选择分数最高且适合首次运行的模型。

steps.title: 一条命令运行模型
steps.body: 用 run 拉取、部署并等待模型服务就绪。

commands.label: 首次使用向导
commands.description: 检查硬件、扫描资源并给出下一条命令。

commands.label: 查看推荐
commands.description: 查看适合当前硬件的模型和引擎组合。

commands.label: 运行模型
commands.description: 拉取、部署并等待模型服务就绪。

commands.label: 启动服务
commands.description: 保持 OpenAI 兼容 API 和 Web UI 常驻。

commands.label: 查看状态
commands.description: 检查硬件、部署和资源概况。

commands.label: 查看硬件
commands.description: 查看 GPU、CPU、内存等基础信息。

items.description: 查看系统总体状态。
查看硬件检测结果。
查看实时硬件指标。
列出已识别模型。
列出可用引擎。
列出当前部署。
列出局域网设备。

groups.title: 顶层命令
groups.description: 由服务端动态填充的顶层命令列表。

items.description: 管理 AI Agent 子系统。需要子命令，例如 /cli agent status。
管理应用依赖声明。需要子命令，例如 /cli app list；注册应用可用 /cli app register --name demo --needs '[]'。
向 AI Agent 提问。需要补问题内容，例如 /cli ask 这台机器适合跑什么模型？
连接支持服务。可直接写求助内容，例如 /cli askforhelp 模型部署失败。
记录并查询基准测试结果。需要子命令，例如 /cli benchmark list。
管理 YAML 知识目录。需要子命令，例如 /cli catalog status 或 /cli catalog validate。
为指定 shell 生成自动补全脚本。需要补 shell 名称，例如 /cli completion zsh。
获取或设置持久化配置。需要子命令，例如 /cli config get agent.endpoint 或 /cli config set agent.model {sample_model}。
部署推理服务。通常需要模型名，例如 /cli deploy {sample_model} --dry-run；查看部署列表可用 /cli deploy list。
管理推理引擎。需要子命令，例如 /cli engine list 或 /cli engine pull。
持久化探索任务。需要子命令，例如 /cli explore start --model {sample_model} 或 /cli explore status --id <run-id>。
管理局域网中的 AIMA 设备集群。需要子命令，例如 /cli fleet devices 或 /cli fleet info <device-id>。
硬件抽象层：检测能力并采集指标。需要子命令，例如 /cli hal detect 或 /cli hal metrics。
查看任意命令帮助。可直接执行，例如 /cli help；查看 model 的帮助可用 /cli help model。
安装基础设施栈。可直接执行，例如 /cli init；完整安装可用 /cli init --k3s。
管理知识库。需要子命令，例如 /cli knowledge list 或 /cli knowledge resolve {sample_model}。
通过 stdio 提供 MCP 服务。可直接执行，例如 /cli mcp。
管理模型。需要子命令，例如 /cli model list 或 /cli model pull {sample_model}。
OpenClaw 集成：将 AIMA 模型同步为 providers。需要子命令，例如 /cli openclaw status 或 /cli openclaw sync。
下载、部署并提供模型服务。需要模型名，例如 /cli run {sample_model}。
管理部署场景。需要子命令，例如 /cli scenario list 或 /cli scenario apply <scenario-name>。
启动 AIMA 服务。可直接执行，例如 /cli serve。
显示系统状态。可直接执行，例如 /cli status。
交互式终端仪表盘。可直接执行，例如 /cli tui。
自动调优：参数搜索 + 基准测试 + 应用最佳结果。需要子命令，例如 /cli tuning start --model {sample_model} 或 /cli tuning results。
移除已部署的推理服务。需要部署名，例如 /cli undeploy <deployment-name>。
显示 AIMA 版本和构建信息。可直接执行，例如 /cli version。
先看当前硬件推荐使用哪些模型和引擎组合。
预先拉取默认引擎，减少首次部署等待。
按模型名下载模型文件，`{sample_model}` 是示例值，可替换为实际模型名。
先预览部署解析结果和推荐配置，`{sample_model}` 是示例值，可替换为实际模型名。
一条命令拉取、部署并等待服务就绪，`{sample_model}` 是示例值，可替换为实际模型名。

items.title: Agent 不可用
items.body: 先用 /cli status、/cli hal detect、/cli model list 等直接命令确认基础状态。

items.title: 需要配置
items.body: 点击右上角设置，检查 LLM endpoint、model 和 API key。

items.title: 需要远程协助
items.body: 点击连线灵机云，按引导进入远程协助流程。

quick_start.intro: Start with the first-run guide, confirm the recommended model, then run a local model with one command.

steps.title: Run the first-run guide
steps.body: Use onboarding to check hardware, scan resources, and produce recommendations.

steps.title: Confirm the recommendation
steps.body: Review the recommendation list and start with the highest-scoring safe model.

steps.title: Run the model
steps.body: Use run to pull, deploy, and wait until the model is ready.

commands.label: First-run guide
commands.description: Check hardware, scan resources, and print the next command.

commands.label: Recommendations
commands.description: Show model and engine combinations that fit this host.

commands.label: Run model
commands.description: Pull, deploy, and wait until the model is ready.

commands.label: Start server
commands.description: Keep the OpenAI-compatible API and Web UI running.

commands.label: Status
commands.description: Inspect hardware, deployments, and overall state.

commands.label: Hardware
commands.description: Show detected GPU, CPU, and memory information.

items.description: Show the overall system state.
Show hardware detection details.
Show live hardware metrics.
List detected models.
List available engines.
List active deployments.
List LAN devices.

groups.title: Top-level commands
groups.description: Top-level commands filled dynamically by the server.

items.description: Manage the AI agent subsystem. It needs a subcommand, for example /cli agent status.
Manage application dependency declarations. It needs a subcommand, for example /cli app list; to register an app use /cli app register --name demo --needs '[]'.
Ask the AI agent a question. You need to add the question text, for example /cli ask What model fits this machine?
Connect to the support service. You can write the help request directly, for example /cli askforhelp Model deployment failed.
Record and query benchmark results. It needs a subcommand, for example /cli benchmark list.
Manage the YAML knowledge catalog. It needs a subcommand, for example /cli catalog status or /cli catalog validate.
Generate shell autocompletion. You need to add the shell name, for example /cli completion zsh.
Get or set persistent configuration. It needs a subcommand, for example /cli config get agent.endpoint or /cli config set agent.model {sample_model}.
Deploy an inference service. It usually needs a model name, for example /cli deploy {sample_model} --dry-run; to inspect deployments use /cli deploy list.
Manage inference engines. It needs a subcommand, for example /cli engine list or /cli engine pull.
Run persistent exploration jobs. It needs a subcommand, for example /cli explore start --model {sample_model} or /cli explore status --id <run-id>.
Manage AIMA devices on the LAN. It needs a subcommand, for example /cli fleet devices or /cli fleet info <device-id>.
Inspect hardware capabilities and metrics. It needs a subcommand, for example /cli hal detect or /cli hal metrics.
View help for any command. You can run it directly, for example /cli help; for model help use /cli help model.
Install the infrastructure stack. You can run it directly, for example /cli init; for the full install use /cli init --k3s.
Manage the knowledge base. It needs a subcommand, for example /cli knowledge list or /cli knowledge resolve {sample_model}.
Serve MCP over stdio. You can run it directly, for example /cli mcp.
Manage models. It needs a subcommand, for example /cli model list or /cli model pull {sample_model}.
Manage the OpenClaw integration. It needs a subcommand, for example /cli openclaw status or /cli openclaw sync.
Download, deploy, and serve a model. You need to add a model name, for example /cli run {sample_model}.
Manage deployment scenarios. It needs a subcommand, for example /cli scenario list or /cli scenario apply <scenario-name>.
Start the AIMA server. You can run it directly, for example /cli serve.
Show system status. You can run it directly, for example /cli status.
Open the terminal dashboard. You can run it directly, for example /cli tui.
Auto-tune model parameters. It needs a subcommand, for example /cli tuning start --model {sample_model} or /cli tuning results.
Remove a deployed inference service. You need to add the deployment name, for example /cli undeploy <deployment-name>.
Show version and build information. You can run it directly, for example /cli version.
Check which model and engine combinations fit the current hardware.
Pre-pull the default engine to reduce first-run latency.
Download a model by name; `{sample_model}` is an example value and can be replaced with a real model name.
Preview the resolved deployment plan before execution; `{sample_model}` is an example value and can be replaced with a real model name.
Resolve, pull, deploy, and wait for readiness in one command; `{sample_model}` is an example value and can be replaced with a real model name.

items.title: Agent unavailable
items.body: Use direct commands like /cli status, /cli hal detect, and /cli model list first.

items.title: Need configuration help
items.body: Open Settings and verify the LLM endpoint, model, and API key.

items.title: Need remote help
items.body: Use the support button to connect to the remote assistance flow.
